---
id: reload-schemas
title: "Reload schemas from filesystem"
description: "Clears the SchemaRegistry cache and reloads all schemas from disk."
sidebar_label: "Reload schemas from filesystem"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reload schemas from filesystem"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/config/schemas/reload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Clears the SchemaRegistry cache and reloads all schemas from disk.

</ParamsDetails>
